creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 179045
[patch] combined patch - update devel/libedit + mysql* & percona* updates

Here is a combined patch that implements the update to devel/libedit and updates the databases/mysql* & percona* ports to build with the new libedit.

In this version of the patch, PORTREVISION was also updated for the databases/ ports - the package contents will change for those ports now that they will use the bundled libedit.
